title: dubrueilia lucens
intro: Dubrueilia lucens, also known as Golden Ragwort, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Dubrueilia lucens include soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used topically in salves and creams to aid in wound healing.
